_publications._publicationTitle: Cell autonomous requirement of neurofibromin (Nf1) for postnatal muscle hypertrophic growth and metabolic homeostasis.
_publications._context: Mouse lines used in this study were described before: Myf5 Cre, Lbx1 Cre, Nf1 flox | Mx1-Cre, Nf1 flox, and Nf1 fcr (Nf1 knockout) mice have been described previously | The NF1 flox/− mice are in a mixed genetic background of C57BL/6/Sv129 and have been described previously | The female Nf1flox mice were crossed to male Nf1flox heterozygous Prx1-Cre-positive males | Inducible Plp-Cre (66) and Nf1 fl/+ (67) mice were maintained on a pure C57BL/6 background | Nf1 mice for conditional deletion (fl Zhu et al., 2001)
